title: jasminum floribundum var. decipiens
intro: Jasminum floribundum var. decipiens, also known as the star jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the olive family, characterized by its fragrant, star-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Jasminum floribundum var. decipiens include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote well-being and relaxation.
